topics.label: Kernel Build
topics.description: Clone, configure (make menuconfig), build, and boot a custom kernel.

topics.label: Kernel Modules
topics.description: Write loadable kernel modules with module_init/module_exit.

topics.label: Device Drivers
topics.description: Character devices, file_operations, and the /dev interface.

topics.label: Kernel Data Structures
topics.description: Linked lists, red-black trees, hash tables from linux/ headers.

topics.label: Concurrency
topics.description: Spinlocks, mutexes, RCU, and atomic operations in kernel space.

topics.label: Submitting Patches
topics.description: Git format-patch, checkpatch.pl, and the kernel mailing list process.
